---
name: Spike
about: Time-boxed exploratory work intended to answer a specific question. Output is a written note, not necessarily code.
title: "[spike] <question>"
labels: ["spike"]
---

## Question

The specific question this spike is trying to answer. One sentence.

## Why now

What downstream decision is blocked or under-informed without this.

## Approach

What you intend to try. Bullet points are fine.

- ...

## Time box

How long before we stop and write up what we learned, even if incomplete.

## Deliverable

A note in `spikes/<name>.md` containing:

- What was tried
- What worked
- What did not
- Surprises
- Constraints discovered
- Assumptions killed
- Recommended next step

## Out of scope

What this spike will explicitly not try to figure out.

- ...
